message.content:
<deliberation>
- Scope: Evaluate REG-008, REG-030, and REG-043 against the provided Microsoft policy chunk. Include cross-references where present.
- Method: Look for explicit contradictions, narrowings, or altered scopes. Per instruction, treat omissions as Non-Deviation.
- REG-008 (Art9(6)): Requires testing of high-risk AI systems to ensure consistent performance and compliance. Policy mentions reviews/impact assessment for Sensitive/Restricted Uses across all AI systems, but does not address testing for high-risk systems. No direct contradiction; omissions → Non-Deviation.
- REG-030 (Art13(6)(iv)-(v)): Requires (where applicable/appropriate) info about explainability capabilities and performance on specific persons/groups. Policy does not discuss such disclosures. No contradiction; omissions → Non-Deviation.
- REG-043 (Art26(1)): Deployers must ensure use in accordance with instructions for use, pursuant to paras 3 and 6. Considered references:
  - REG-045 (Art26(3)): Without prejudice to other obligations; deployers free to organise resources.
  - REG-048 (Art26(6)): Keep logs for at least six months (unless otherwise provided).
  The policy addresses annual reviews and ORA reporting, but not instruction adherence or logs. No contradiction; omissions → Non-Deviation.
- Conclusion: No deviations detected in the provided chunk for the three nodes.
</deliberation>
